title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Zoro, Unknown person #14, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #15 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If an enemy crosses that line...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's an interception system that surrounds the Labo phase.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You shouldn't underestimate the world's number one scientist.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you please just say these things beforehand?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! You really have a bad attitude, Stussy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ufufu... How was it? Quite the warm-up don't you think?:o

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one is allowed to wreak havoc more than me here on egghead!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Atlas! She's one of the vegapunks!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: We've got evacuation orders from Master Shaka!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone! Run towards the factory! We're being raided!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up! We're going up using the "Vacuum Rocket"!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
